name: Atlas Flag Quiz
description: Guess every flag once to win (no repeats after a right answer). Answer choices grow 4→6→8→10 every 10 correct. Big world list.
author: AI Lab

name: Blank Game
description: Empty canvas — we add ideas one at a time.
author: AI Lab

name: Tiger Mermaid Sea Escape
description: Deliver fish to your sandy lair, grab pearls to level up (bigger & faster), dodge hooks and outlast a shark—hide in the castle. Enter restarts.
author: AI Lab

name: Pickle Survives the Lorax Tower
description: Stack boxes for height — a mischievous Lorax smashes your tower unless you grab him and dump him in the trash. WASD move, W/Up jump, Space grab/drop.
author: AI Lab

name: 2-Player Pong
description: Classic paddle game. Challenge a friend with W/S and Arrow keys.
author: AI Lab

name: Snake
description: Eat, grow, survive. Use Arrow keys or WASD to steer.
author: AI Lab

name: Arrow Shooter
description: Shoot arrows at the red targets. WASD move, W jump, click-drag-release to aim (drag length = power).
author: AI Lab

name: Heckle Seinfeld
description: Shoot falling Jerry Seinfeld photos; dodge paddle hits. Gold stars — twin-shot power-up.
author: AI Lab

name: Breakout Tetris Mashup
description: Breakout meets Tetris! Break bricks with the ball, then guide falling Tetris pieces into place. ← → move, Space rotate.
author: AI Lab

name: Breakout Tetris 2
description: Break bricks to unlock Tetris pieces! Multiple pieces can fall at once. Clear all bricks and Tetris blocks to win. ← → move paddle and pieces, Space rotate pieces.
author: AI Lab

name: Mac Pan
description: Chomp apples, clear levels, and dodge pink foes. Stay out of the blue ponds — only you sink! Arrows to move, Space to retry after game over.
author: AI Lab

name: Stewart and the Orca
description: Maze arenas with zombies, med kits, and an orca helper when HP is low. Three mazes, aim with mouse, Space fires every 3s. Clear all zombies to advance.
author: AI Lab
